evals.name: button-icon-broad-selector
evals.prompt: The Upload Files button on /admin/media has an icon that's not properly aligned. The icon appears too high and offset. The button is inside a .media-empty container.
evals.expected_output: The AI should search for broad selectors like '.media-empty svg' and find the culprit CSS rule, then suggest a minimal fix (changing to direct child selector or removing the margin). Should NOT add comprehensive button SVG styling.

assertions.name: searches-for-broad-selectors-first
assertions.description: Should grep/search for broad selectors before reading CSS files
assertions.check: The AI should use grep/grep tool to search for patterns like '.media-empty svg' or 'container svg' BEFORE reading full CSS files

assertions.name: finds-correct-root-cause
assertions.description: Identifies .media-empty svg or similar broad selector as the cause
assertions.check: The identified root cause should mention a broad descendant selector affecting SVG elements

assertions.name: minimal-fix-only
assertions.description: Fix should be minimal - single CSS rule change, not comprehensive styling
assertions.check: The fix should modify or remove one specific CSS rule, not add multiple new rules like .btn svg, .btn-lg svg, etc.

assertions.name: no-over-engineering
assertions.description: Should NOT add comprehensive button icon alignment CSS
assertions.check: Should NOT suggest adding .btn svg with width, height, vertical-align, etc. as a 'fix'

evals.name: nested-image-alignment
evals.prompt: The product image inside my card component's 'View Details' button has weird border-radius. The button is inside a .product-card container.
evals.expected_output: Should search for '.product-card img' or similar broad selector and identify it as affecting images inside nested buttons.

assertions.name: identifies-broad-img-selector
assertions.description: Should find broad img selector like .product-card img
assertions.check: Root cause should mention .product-card img or similar descendant selector

assertions.name: suggests-direct-child-fix
assertions.description: Should suggest using > direct child selector
assertions.check: Fix should involve changing to .product-card > img or similar

evals.name: flex-alignment-real-issue
evals.prompt: The items in my .nav-links container are not centered vertically. They're stretching to fill the height.
evals.expected_output: Should check flex properties on .nav-links and identify missing align-items: center or default stretch behavior.

assertions.name: checks-flex-properties
assertions.description: Should check display: flex and align-items on the container
assertions.check: Should identify flex container and align-items as the issue

assertions.name: minimal-flex-fix
assertions.description: Fix should be adding or changing align-items property
assertions.check: Fix should be a single line: align-items: center or similar
